note: The official 2025-2026 Programme page publishes 78 units of Major Courses: 9 units of Transdisciplinary Common Core, 21 units of Programme-specific Knowledge / Skill Courses, 15 units of Experiential Learning and 33 units attached to one selected concentration (Sound, Technology or Visual), followed by a 10-unit Honours Project. Each concentration consists of 6 foundation units, 9 core units, 9 concentration-elective units and 9 concentration-free-elective units. For the free-elective component, the Handbook recommends three more 3-unit courses from the selected concentration but explicitly permits any three 3-unit Foundation, Core or Concentration Elective courses from any of the three concentrations; this cross-concentration pool is preserved and is not treated as a narrower closed path. The Sound page contains unresolved unit conflicts: its rule says to take three listed 3-unit courses but includes four 2-unit Composition for Screen courses, while MUSI4025, MUSI4026 and MUSI4027 are displayed as 3 units on the concentration page but as 2 units on their linked 2025-2026 course pages. The course-page values are stored and the conflicts are described per course without inferring completion arithmetic. Minor title differences for VART3386, COMP3115, COMP4045 and TRAN4076 are resolved using the linked course pages. The 2026-2027 Handbook endpoint currently returns HTTP 401 Basic Authentication and is not represented as verified; this source remains explicitly scoped to 2025-2026. University Core, General Education and Free Electives outside the coded Major structure are excluded. No Year or Term is assigned.
